ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: If enabled, events occurring during a cooldown phase will reset the cooldown timer, making the cooldown last longer. Thus, executions are avoided for an extended period.
ast.target: 如果启用，在冷却阶段发生的事件将重置冷却计时器，使冷却时间延长。因此，执行将在更长的时间内被避免。

ast.name: title
ast.source: Show a notification when executing shell commands
ast.target: 执行 Shell 命令时显示通知

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Needs to be over 0. One decimal is supported.
ast.target: 必须大于 0。支持一位小数。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Only used in settings, will not appear in output.
ast.target: 仅在设置中使用，不会出现在输出中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use {{output}} as a placeholder for text that will be received from a shell command. Other variables are available, too.
ast.target: 使用 {{output}} 作为将从 Shell 命令接收的文本的占位符。也可以使用其他变量。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: A label used to select the shell in settings.
ast.target: 用于在设置中选择 Shell 的标签。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If the shell virtualizes, uses as a subsystem, or otherwise emulates another operating system than the selected host operating system, select it here. This is used to make directory paths etc. work correctly.
ast.target: 如果 Shell 虚拟化、用作子系统或以其他方式模拟所选主机操作系统之外的另一个操作系统，请在此处选择。这用于使目录路径等正常工作。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Used to quote special characters (= other than alphabets, numbers and _) in {{variable}} values.
ast.target: 用于引用 {{variable}} 值中的特殊字符（即除字母、数字和 _ 以外的字符）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This should only contain a directory and a file name (or just a file name), not any possible command line options/arguments. They will be configured below.
ast.target: 此处应仅包含目录和文件名（或仅文件名），不包含任何可能的命令行选项/参数。它们将在下方配置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Note: No binary path is defined.
ast.target: 注意：未定义二进制文件路径。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The shell is only available when Obsidian runs on the selected operating system. Note that in case your shell utilizes a sub-operating system (e.g. Windows Subsystem for Linux, WSL), you still need to select the operating system Obsidian is running on, not the sub-system's operating system.
ast.target: 该 Shell 仅在 Obsidian 运行于所选操作系统时可用。请注意，如果你的 Shell 使用了子操作系统（例如 Windows Subsystem for Linux, WSL），你仍然需要选择 Obsidian 运行的操作系统，而不是子系统的操作系统。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The function SHOULD NOT CAUSE side effects! It must not alter any data outside it. Try to keep the function short and simple, as possible errors are hard to inspect. The function is never called for relative paths.
ast.target: 该函数不应产生副作用！它不得更改其外部的任何数据。请尽量保持函数简短简单，因为可能的错误难以检查。该函数永远不会为相对路径调用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This command is only executed from this settings modal. {{variables}} are supported. Output appears in a notification balloon. When playing around, keep in mind that the command is really executed, so avoid using possibly dangerous commands.
ast.target: 此命令仅从此设置模态框执行。支持 {{variables}}。输出显示在通知气泡中。在尝试时，请记住命令是真实执行的，因此请避免使用可能危险的命令。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Must contain at least one character. Allowed characters are letters a-z, numbers 0-9 and an underscore _
ast.target: 必须至少包含一个字符。允许的字符是字母 a-z、数字 0-9 和下划线 _。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Appears in autocomplete lists along with the variable name, and also in the 'Custom variables' pane, if you use it.
ast.target: 与变量名一起显示在自动补全列表中，如果你使用它，也会显示在“自定义变量”窗格中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Where the inputted value will be stored in. You can use the variable in a shell command.
ast.target: 输入值将存储的位置。你可以在 Shell 命令中使用该变量。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If on, the field needs to be filled before the prompt can be submitted.
ast.target: 如果开启，则在提交提示之前需要填写该字段。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: What value the target variable will have if the toggle is checked. The toggle is checked by default, if the Default value (defined above) matches this value. The match is not case-sensitive.
ast.target: 如果开关被选中，目标变量将具有的值。如果默认值（在上面定义）与此值匹配，则开关默认为选中状态。匹配不区分大小写。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: What value the target variable will have if the toggle is not checked. {{variables}} can be used both here and above.
ast.target: 如果开关未被选中，目标变量将具有的值。{{variables}} 可以在此处和上方使用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: A list of options of which one can be selected. Put each option on their own line. You can define a separate value and label for an option by separating them with a pipe |, e.g. MyValue|MyLabel. {{variables}} are supported in both values and labels.
ast.target: 一个选项列表，可以从中选择一个。将每个选项放在单独的行上。你可以通过用竖线 | 分隔来为选项定义单独的值和标签，例如 MyValue|MyLabel。{{variables}} 在值和标签中均受支持。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Displayed between the prompt title and fields. Both Description and Title support {{variables}}.
ast.target: 显示在提示标题和字段之间。描述和标题都支持 {{variables}}。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If this is on, the prompt will display the executable shell command with variable names in it, and highlight the variable(s) that will be affected by the values inputted in the prompt.
ast.target: 如果开启，提示将显示包含变量名的可执行 Shell 命令，并高亮显示将受提示中输入的值影响的变量。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Tip! You can use {{variables}} in 'Field label', 'Default value', 'Description' etc.
ast.target: 提示！你可以在“字段标签”、“默认值”、“描述”等中使用 {{variables}}。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If defined, the icon will be shown in file menu, folder menu, and editor menu in front of the alias text. It's also shown in the settings. It makes it easier to distinguish different shell commands visually from each other.
ast.target: 如果定义，图标将显示在文件菜单、文件夹菜单和编辑器菜单中别名文本的前面。它也会显示在设置中。这使得在视觉上更容易区分不同的 Shell 命令。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 可以包含 {{variables}} 和/或静态文本。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Prompts are used to ask values from the user right before shell command execution. The values can be accessed in the shell command via custom variables. You can manage all prompts in the plugin's main settings view, under the 'Preactions' tab.
ast.target: 提示用于在 Shell 命令执行前立即向用户询问值。这些值可以通过自定义变量在 Shell 命令中访问。你可以在插件的主设置视图中的“前置操作”选项卡下管理所有提示。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When output contains both errors and normal output, which one should be presented first? (Only matters if 'Output handling' is 'Wait until finished').
ast.target: 当输出同时包含错误和正常输出时，应优先显示哪一个？（仅当“输出处理”为“等待完成”时才重要）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, events cannot perform multiple concurrent (or too adjacent) executions of this shell command. Debouncing does not affect events marked with
ast.target: 如果启用，事件无法对此 Shell 命令执行多次并发（或过于接近）的执行。防抖不会影响标记为的事件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If you only need to prevent simultaneous execution, but do not need extra cooldown time, you can set this to 0.
ast.target: 如果你只需要防止同时执行，但不需要额外的冷却时间，可以将此设置为 0。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Debouncing is disabled, so executions can happen simultaneously and without delays.
ast.target: 防抖已禁用，因此执行可以同时发生且没有延迟。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Certain variables can be inaccessible during certain situations, e.g. {{file_name}} is not available when no file pane is focused. You can define default values that will be used when a variable is otherwise unavailable.
ast.target: 某些变量在某些情况下可能无法访问，例如 {{file_name}} 在没有文件窗格聚焦时不可用。你可以定义默认值，当变量在其他情况下不可用时将使用这些默认值。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Used on operating systems that do not define their own shell command.
ast.target: 用于未定义自己 Shell 命令的操作系统。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Looks up shell commands' aliases, commands, ids and icons.
ast.target: 查找 Shell 命令的别名、命令、ID 和图标。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This is a quick way to immediately turn off all events, if you want.
ast.target: 如果你想立即关闭所有事件，这是一个快速方法。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If on, variable names are substituted with their realtime values when you view your commands in the command palette and right click context menus (if used). A nice way to ensure your commands will use correct values.
ast.target: 如果开启，当你在命令面板和右键上下文菜单（如果使用）中查看命令时，变量名将被其实时值替换。这是确保命令使用正确值的好方法。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If on, a dropdown menu shows up when you begin writing {{variable}} names, showing matching variables and their instructions. Also allows defining custom suggestions in autocomplete.yaml file - see the documentation.
ast.target: 如果开启，当你开始输入 {{variable}} 名称时，会出现一个下拉菜单，显示匹配的变量及其说明。还允许在 autocomplete.yaml 文件中定义自定义建议 - 请参阅文档。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Exception: no notifications will be shown for changing values manually via prompts.
ast.target: 例外：通过提示手动更改值时不会显示通知。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Define e.g. WSL (Windows Subsystem for Linux), MinGW-w64 (Git Bash), or Wine here.
ast.target: 在此处定义例如 WSL (Windows Subsystem for Linux)、MinGW-w64 (Git Bash) 或 Wine。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If a shell command's output is directed to the clipboard, also show the output in a popup box in the top right corner. This helps to notice what was inserted into clipboard.
ast.target: 如果 Shell 命令的输出被定向到剪贴板，同时在右上角的弹出框中显示输出。这有助于注意到插入剪贴板的内容。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: React to line or column changes

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 可执行二进制文件路径

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Execute a command to test the shell

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 在提示中预览 Shell 命令

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 将变量传递到标准输入 (stdin)（实验性）

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 标准输出/标准错误输出顺序

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 在 Obsidian 命令面板中的可用性

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Execute this shell command automatically when:
ast.target: 在以下情况下自动执行此 Shell 命令：

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Detect colors, font styles etc. in output (ANSI code)
ast.target: 检测输出中的颜色、字体样式等（ANSI 代码）

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Preview variables in command palette and menus
ast.target: 在命令面板和菜单中预览变量

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Show notifications when values of custom variables change
ast.target: 当自定义变量的值发生变化时显示通知

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.target: 文档：可执行二进制文件路径

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.target: 文档：Windows：为 Shell 参数添加引号

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: Execute the test command using this shell.
ast.target: 使用此 Shell 执行测试命令。

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: Documentation: Execute a command to test the shell
ast.target: 文档：执行命令以测试 Shell

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: Configure binary file location, escaping, directory handling etc.
ast.target: 配置二进制文件位置、转义、目录处理等。

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: Toggle showing variable names or values.

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: Try the prompt without executing any shell command.
ast.target: 尝试提示符而不执行任何 Shell 命令。

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.target: 文档：通过 stdin 传递变量

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: Documentation: Output text styling with ANSI code
ast.target: 文档：使用 ANSI 代码设置输出文本样式

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: Open a pane that displays all custom variables and their values.
ast.target: 打开一个显示所有自定义变量及其值的窗格。

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.target: 管理 Obsidian 的等宽字体

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: The seconds need to be over 0!

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: SHELL COMMANDS PLUGIN HAS DISABLED ITSELF in order to prevent misinterpreting settings / corrupting the settings file!
ast.target: SHELL 命令插件已自行禁用，以防止误解设置/损坏设置文件！

ast.name: PowerShell
ast.source: PowerShell style with ` as escape character
ast.target: PowerShell 风格，使用 ` 作为转义字符

ast.name: text
ast.source: Tip! If you select something, only the selected text will be used.
ast.target: 提示！如果您选择了内容，则仅使用选定的文本。

ast.name: text
ast.source: (This is not a real shell command, it's just an example for this preview when no real shell command is available.)
ast.target: （这不是一个真实的 Shell 命令，它只是在没有真实 Shell 命令可用时用于此预览的示例。）

ast.name: text
ast.source: If not empty, the alias will be displayed in the command palette instead of the actual command. An alias is never executed as a command.
ast.target: 如果非空，别名将显示在命令面板中，而不是实际命令。别名永远不会作为命令执行。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Preactions are performed before the actual shell command gets executed, to do certain preparations for the shell command.
ast.target: 预操作在实际 Shell 命令执行之前执行，为 Shell 命令进行某些准备工作。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Are you sure you want to delete this shell command?
ast.target: 您确定要删除此 Shell 命令吗？

ast.name: text
ast.source: No shell commands yet, click the 'New shell command' button below.
ast.target: 尚无 Shell 命令，请点击下方的“新建 Shell 命令”按钮。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Events introduce a way to execute shell commands automatically in certain situations, e.g. when Obsidian starts. They are set up for each shell command separately, but this tab contains general options for them.
ast.target: 事件引入了一种在特定情况下自动执行 Shell 命令的方式，例如当 Obsidian 启动时。它们是为每个 Shell 命令单独设置的，但此选项卡包含它们的通用选项。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The following gives just a quick glance over which events are enabled on which shell commands. To enable/disable events for a shell command, go to the particular shell command's settings via the 'Shell commands' tab. The list is only updated when you reopen the whole settings panel.
ast.target: 以下内容仅快速概览哪些 Shell 命令启用了哪些事件。要启用/禁用 Shell 命令的事件，请通过“Shell 命令”选项卡转到特定 Shell 命令的设置。此列表仅在您重新打开整个设置面板时更新。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No events are enabled for any shell commands.
ast.target: 没有为任何 Shell 命令启用事件。

ast.name: text
ast.source: When you type variables into commands, a preview text appears under the command field to show how the command will look like when it gets executed with variables substituted with their real values.
ast.target: 当您在命令中输入变量时，命令字段下方会出现预览文本，显示当变量被替换为其实际值时命令的外观。

ast.name: text
ast.source: All variables that access the current file, may cause the command preview to fail if you had no file panel active when you opened the settings window - e.g. you had focus on graph view instead of a note = no file is currently active. But this does not break anything else than the preview.
ast.target: 所有访问当前文件的变量，如果在打开设置窗口时没有活动的文件面板（例如，您将焦点放在了图形视图而不是笔记上 = 当前没有活动文件），可能会导致命令预览失败。但这不会破坏除预览之外的任何其他内容。

ast.name: UnixShell
ast.source: Unix shell style with \ as escape character
ast.target: Unix Shell 风格，使用 \\ 作为转义字符
